outputs.description: The port number associated with the service running on the IP. Censys.IP.services.transport_protocol The transport protocol used by the service running on the IP.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.services.port

outputs.description: The name of the service running on the IP. Censys.IP.services.cert The SSL/TLS certificate associated with the service running on the IP.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.services.protocol

outputs.description: Labels associated with the IP address (with premium access only). Censys.IP.dns.reverse_dns.names Reverse DNS names associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.labels

outputs.description: The country code of the autonomous system associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.autonomous_system.description Description of the autonomous system associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.autonomous_system.country_code

outputs.description: Name of the autonomous system associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.autonomous_system.bgp_prefix BGP prefix of the autonomous system associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.autonomous_system.name

outputs.description: Autonomous System Number (ASN) of the autonomous system associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.ip The IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.autonomous_system.asn

outputs.description: Country name of the location associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.location.timezone Time zone of the location associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.location.country

outputs.description: Province name of the location associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.location.coordinates.latitude Latitude coordinate of the location associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.location.province

outputs.description: Longitude coordinate of the location associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.location.continent Continent name of the location associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.location.coordinates.longitude

outputs.description: Postal code of the location associated with the IP address. Censys.IP.location.city City name of the location associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.location.postal_code

outputs.description: Country code of the location associated with the IP address. IP.Address The IP address.
outputs.name: Censys.IP.location.country_code

outputs.description: The IP ASN. IP.Geo.Country The IP country.
outputs.name: IP.ASN

outputs.description: The IP location. IP.UpdatedDate The IP last update
outputs.name: IP.Geo.Location

outputs.description: The IP port DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: IP.Port

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Score The actual score.

outputs.description: Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
